## Type
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Improvement to existing skill
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs / infra

## Checklist
- [ ] `SKILL.md` has frontmatter (`name`, `description`)
- [ ] No hardcoded usernames, paths, emails, or secrets
- [ ] Destructive actions require explicit user confirmation
- [ ] Scripts pass `bash -n` (and ideally `shellcheck`)
- [ ] Added entry to README.md skills table (if new skill)
- [ ] Tested manually on a real machine
